TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Hrung = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Hrung. 231 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 553 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 230 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 323 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 38%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Ngayan alang Pnyahan pnatas/ndaan Gaya na Atayal- tnhrigan na alang daka pkrana
S.PHON: = ħɾuŋ = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ ħɾuŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. ŋajan alaŋ pnjaħan pnatas/ndaan gaja na atajal- tnħɾigan na alaŋ daka pkɾana
S.FORM: = Hrung = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Hrung. 231 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 553 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 230 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 323 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 38%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Ngayan alang Pnyahan pnatas/ndaan Gaya na Atayal- tnhrigan na alang daka pkrana
S.PHON: = ħɾuŋ = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ ħɾuŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. ŋajan alaŋ pnjaħan pnatas/ndaan gaja na atajal- tnħɾigan na alaŋ daka pkɾana
